display_text: Nyx Assassin Aghanim's Scepter: Burrow — Provides high damage reduction and strong AoE control with instant Spiked Carapace stuns. This transforms Nyx Assassin into a stationary defensive powerhouse, countering heavy AoE damage and enabling safer high-ground defense or objective control.
search_text: Nyx Assassin Aghanim Scepter Burrow anti-AoE damage reduction stationary defensive high-ground control

display_text: Nyx Assassin Aghanim's Shard: Vendetta — Applies Break on attack, directly countering passives like Evasion or Dispersion. This enhances Nyx Assassin's assassination potential, allowing him to shut down key enemy heroes reliant on passive abilities.
search_text: Nyx Assassin Aghanim Shard Vendetta Break counter-passives anti-evasion assassination
